zh.Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England: 英國戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Channon於1552年出生在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利時，他的父親William Canon37歲，母親Florence Alice Anslow37歲。他於1577年與Maria Welsh在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年5月8日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Channon于1552年出生在英国英格兰戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利时，他的父亲William Canon37岁，母亲Florence Alice Anslow37岁。他于1577年与Maria Welsh在英国英格兰戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年5月8日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利。

nameMeanings.name: Channon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cannon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Canann or Ó Canáin ‘descendant of Cano or Canán’. Occasionally, and in the Isle of Man, the surname derives from Mac Canann ‘son of Cano or Canán’, which in Ireland was Anglicized McCann or McConnon . See also Connon . The personal name is from Gaelic cano ‘wolf cub’, of which Canán is a diminutive. In Ulster Cannon may also be shortened from Ó Canannáin ‘descendant of Canannán’, a pet form (double diminutive) of the personal name. This was a cheiftan family in Donegal, and the name was particularly common there.

English: from Middle English canun ‘canon’ (Old Norman French canonie, canoine, from Late Latin canonicus). In medieval England this term denoted a clergyman living with others in a clergy house; the surname is mostly an occupational name for a servant in a house of canons, although it could also be a nickname or even a patronymic.

variants.name: Channing
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Channon  , see   Cannon  .

History: The earliest American Channing was John, who came from Dorset, England, in 1711 with his wife. Their son John became a prosperous merchant of Newport, RI, and their grandson William Ellery was born there in 1780. William Ellery Channing (1780–1842) was a Unitarian clergyman who founded the Massachusetts Peace Society, a precursor of the modern anti-war movement.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Channon was born in 1552, in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Canon, was 37 and his mother, Florence Alice Anslow, was 37. He married Maria Welsh in 1577, in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 8 May 1603, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Channon est né en 1552, à Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Canon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Florence Alice Anslow, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Maria Welsh en 1577, à Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1603, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1577 in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom Maria Welsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1603 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Channonが1552年にイギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーで生まれた時，父William Canonは37歳，母Florence Alice Anslowは37歳であった。1577年にイギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーでMaria Welshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年5月8日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon district,: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이
ko.Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이
ko.lifeSummary: John Channon(이)가 1552년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Canon(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence Alice Anslow(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에서 Maria Welsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 5월 8일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Maria Welsh em 1577, em Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, Unite: сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Channon родился в 1552 г. в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Canon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Alice Anslow, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Welsh в 1577 г. в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1603 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 8 de mayo de 1603, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
